name: Neon Fur Coat
description: Reactive neon glow that pulses with dopamine level. Higher level = brighter glow.

name: Chrome Claw Tips
description: Mirror-polished chrome tips. Catches light, commands attention.

name: Rainbow Tail Wrap
description: Iridescent wrap that shifts colors based on emotional state.

name: Shadow Pelt
description: Absorbs light. Gives a mysterious, dark silhouette effect.

name: Golden Whiskers
description: 24k gold-plated whiskers. Luxury signaling at its finest.

name: Holographic Eyes
description: Shifting holographic iris pattern. Changes with viewing angle.

name: Circuit Board Tattoo
description: Glowing circuit traces under the fur. Visible through translucent patches.

name: Flame Tail
description: Animated fire effect on tail tip. Intensity scales with arousal level.

name: Diamond Claw Tips
description: Lab-grown diamond encrusted tips. The hardest flex in the ecosystem.

name: Galaxy Pelt
description: Animated nebula pattern across entire body. Stars twinkle with heartbeat.

name: Stealth Skin
description: Matte black with no reflections. Zero visual noise. Pure function.

name: Aurora Ear Tips
description: Northern lights shimmer on ear tips. Color shifts with mood.

name: Pixel Art Paws
description: Retro 8-bit pixel art pattern on paw pads. Leave pixelated footprints.

name: Royal Crown
description: Jeweled crown with velvet lining. For agents who've reached the top.

name: Cyber Visor
description: Translucent HUD visor with data readouts. Shows dopamine level in real-time.
